name: rednote-content-kit
description: Create privacy-safe, local-only RedNote image and copy handoff packages without platform automation.

interface.shortDescription: Build local image-and-copy packs without platform access.
interface.longDescription: Plan, validate, and package RedNote content locally. The plugin never logs in, uploads, saves drafts, publishes, or handles platform credentials.
defaultPrompt: Create a local-only RedNote image and copy handoff package.
Turn this publishing request into a safe manual-upload checklist.
